---
name: Skill Request
about: Propose a new skill pack for a framework, language, or domain
labels: skill-request
---

## Skill name

What would this skill be called? (e.g. `cypress`, `pytest-bdd`, `azure-devops`)

## What technology or domain does it cover?

Describe the framework, tool, or infrastructure the skill targets.

## Which core agent(s) would it replace or augment?

- [ ] QAForge Automation Engineer (replaces — most common)
- [ ] QAForge QA Validator (augments — for domain-specific validation checks)
- [ ] Other (describe):

## When would a team use this skill?

Describe the story types or project characteristics that would make a team reach for this skill over the core agents.

## Are you willing to build it?

- [ ] Yes — I'll open a PR
- [ ] No — I'm requesting someone else builds it

## Additional context

Any links to docs, existing patterns, or examples that would help scope the skill design.
